narrative:
Circleville 1-A (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,115 registered voters, with 52.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.5 percentage points.
